title.zh: 球杆百科 - 台球球杆品牌与产品指南
title.en: CuePedia - Pool Cue Brand & Product Guide

description.zh: 全面的台球球杆品牌百科，涵盖 Predator、Mezz、McDermott 等主流品牌的全系列产品介绍与选购指南。
description.en: Comprehensive billiard cue encyclopedia covering all major brands including Predator, Mezz, McDermott with detailed series reviews and buying guides.
